## Testing checklist

- [ ] Builds locally (`./gradlew assembleDebug`)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`)
- [ ] Android Lint passes (`./gradlew lintDebug`)
- [ ] Manually verified on device or emulator
- [ ] Accessibility checked per [docs/conventions/accessibility.md](../docs/conventions/accessibility.md)
